mapper.insert: insert into assistant_instruction_profiles(user_id, name, current_version_id, enabled, is_default, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at) values(#{userId}, #{name}, #{currentVersionId}, #{enabled}, #{isDefault}, #{deletedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: select * from assistant_instruction_profiles where user_id=#{userId} and enabled and deleted_at is null order by is_default desc, id
select * from assistant_instruction_profiles where user_id=#{userId} and deleted_at is null order by is_default desc, id
select * from assistant_instruction_profiles where id=#{profileId} and user_id=#{userId} and deleted_at is null
select * from assistant_instruction_profiles where user_id=#{userId} and enabled and is_default and deleted_at is null limit 1
mapper.update: update assistant_instruction_profiles set current_version_id=#{versionId}, updated_at=#{updatedAt} where id=#{profileId} and user_id=#{userId} and deleted_at is null
update assistant_instruction_profiles set name=#{name}, updated_at=#{updatedAt} where id=#{profileId} and user_id=#{userId} and deleted_at is null
update assistant_instruction_profiles set is_default=false, updated_at=#{updatedAt} where user_id=#{userId} and is_default and deleted_at is null
update assistant_instruction_profiles set is_default=true, enabled=true, updated_at=#{updatedAt} where id=#{profileId} and user_id=#{userId} and deleted_at is null

update assistant_instruction_profiles set enabled=#{enabled}, is_default=case when #{enabled} then is_default else false end, updated_at=#{updatedAt} where id=#{profileId} and user_id=#{userId} and deleted_at is null
update assistant_instruction_profiles set enabled=false, is_default=false, deleted_at=#{deletedAt}, updated_at=#{deletedAt} where id=#{profileId} and user_id=#{userId} and deleted_at is null
